meta.organiser: Organised with the MIT Plasma Science and Fusion Center

programmeNote: June 1-3 is three full days of talks and tutorials, plus an optional fourth day of lab tours (to be confirmed).

formats.name: Hands-on tutorials
formats.desc: OSSFE's signature format: get a room up and running with your software, live.

formats.name: Talks
formats.desc: Present a tool, a result, or a lesson to the full track audience.

formats.name: Lightning talks
formats.desc: Five minutes to put a project or idea on everyone's radar.

formats.name: Posters
formats.desc: Discuss work in progress over a coffee break, no slides needed.
